story.mission: Our mission is making technology accessible, reliable, and stress-free for everyone — whether you're running a business or managing a smart home.
story.audience: We serve small businesses, homeowners, and anyone in South Florida who needs dependable IT support they can count on.
story.bilingual: Our team is fully bilingual (English/Russian), so you can communicate in the language you're most comfortable with.

Services.title: Our Services
Services.intro: From computer repair to smart home automation, we provide comprehensive IT solutions for homes and businesses in Boca Raton, Fort Lauderdale, and throughout South Florida. Every service includes a free consultation and transparent pricing.

computer-repair.name: Computer Repair
computer-repair.description: Expert diagnostics and repair for desktops and laptops in South Florida. Fast turnaround, transparent pricing.
computer-repair.fullDescription:
Is your computer running slow, freezing constantly, or refusing to boot up? At ITfix, we provide professional computer repair services for all desktops and laptops in Boca Raton and South Florida. Our experienced technicians perform thorough hardware and software diagnostics to pinpoint the exact issue — whether it's a failing hard drive, overheating CPU, broken screen, or corrupted operating system. We work with all major brands including Dell, HP, Lenovo, Apple, ASUS, and more.

Our repair process is straightforward and transparent. We diagnose the problem, provide you with a clear estimate, and begin work only after your approval. Most repairs are completed the same day, so you're not without your computer for long. We also offer performance tuning and upgrades — SSD installations, RAM upgrades, and thermal repasting — to breathe new life into aging machines.

Whether you're a homeowner in Boca Raton, a small business owner in Deerfield Beach, or a professional working from home in Palm Beach County, our computer repair service is designed to get you back online quickly and affordably. We serve residential and commercial clients throughout South Florida with the same level of care and expertise.
features: Comprehensive hardware and software diagnostics for all PC and Mac models
Screen, battery, keyboard, and internal component repair and replacement
SSD upgrades, RAM expansion, and performance optimization to speed up slow systems
Same-day repair for most common issues — minimal downtime guaranteed
Transparent pricing with written estimates before any work begins
On-site and in-shop repair options available throughout South Florida

windows-reinstall.name: Windows Reinstall
windows-reinstall.description: Clean Windows installation with full data backup, driver setup, and software restoration.
windows-reinstall.fullDescription:
A clean Windows installation is one of the most effective ways to resolve persistent software issues, remove stubborn malware, or simply give your computer a fresh start. At ITfix, we handle the entire Windows reinstall process professionally — from data backup to final configuration — so you can sit back and relax.

Before we begin, we perform a complete backup of all your important files, photos, documents, and settings. Then we install the latest version of Windows (10 or 11) with all current updates, install the correct drivers for your specific hardware, and restore your essential applications and data. We also optimize system settings for peak performance and configure Windows Defender or your preferred antivirus for ongoing protection.

This service is ideal for computers that have been running for years without a fresh install, machines affected by malware that can't be fully cleaned, or new computers that need proper setup. We serve clients throughout Boca Raton, Fort Lauderdale, and all of South Florida, and we can work on-site at your home or business.
features: Complete data backup and verification before any changes are made
Fresh installation of Windows 10 or 11 with all latest security updates
Hardware-specific driver installation and system optimization for peak performance
Restoration of essential applications, browser profiles, and user settings
Antivirus configuration and security hardening after installation
Post-installation walkthrough so you understand your refreshed system

virus-removal.name: Virus Removal
virus-removal.description: Complete malware detection, removal, and system hardening to protect your computer.
virus-removal.fullDescription:
Viruses, malware, ransomware, and spyware can compromise your personal data, slow down your computer, and even cost you money through unauthorized charges. At ITfix, we offer thorough virus removal and malware cleanup services for residents and businesses in Boca Raton and South Florida. Our multi-layered approach ensures that every threat is identified, removed, and prevented from returning.

We use professional-grade security tools and multiple detection engines to perform deep system scans that go far beyond what consumer antivirus software can do. Our technicians identify and eliminate viruses, trojans, ransomware, adware, keyloggers, and rootkits. After removal, we harden your system by closing security vulnerabilities, configuring firewalls, and setting up robust ongoing protection.

Don't wait until malware causes serious damage. If you're noticing unusual pop-ups, slow performance, unknown programs, or suspicious browser behavior, contact ITfix immediately. We serve the entire South Florida area and can often provide same-day virus removal service.
features: Deep multi-engine system scan to detect all types of malware and hidden threats
Complete removal of viruses, trojans, ransomware, spyware, adware, and rootkits
System hardening including firewall configuration and vulnerability patching
Professional antivirus installation and ongoing protection setup
Data recovery for files encrypted or damaged by malware
Security education — we teach you how to avoid future infections

wifi-setup.name: Wi-Fi Setup
wifi-setup.description: Professional wireless network design and optimization for complete home or office coverage.
wifi-setup.fullDescription:
Struggling with dead zones, slow speeds, or unreliable Wi-Fi in your South Florida home or office? ITfix provides professional Wi-Fi setup and optimization services in Boca Raton, Fort Lauderdale, and throughout Palm Beach County. We analyze your space, recommend the right equipment, and configure your network so every room gets strong, fast, and secure wireless coverage.

Our Wi-Fi setup process starts with a thorough site survey. We assess your property layout, identify sources of interference, and determine the best router placement or mesh network design for your specific environment. Whether you need a single high-performance router for a condo or a multi-node mesh system for a large home, we'll design and install a solution that delivers consistent coverage everywhere.

We also configure advanced security settings (WPA3 encryption), set up separate guest networks, prioritize bandwidth for critical devices, and help you manage connected devices. Our goal is a Wi-Fi network that's fast, reliable, and secure — so you can stream, work, and game without interruption.
features: Professional site survey and wireless signal analysis for your specific property
Router selection and WPA3 security configuration for maximum protection
Mesh network design and installation for whole-home or whole-office coverage
Guest network setup, bandwidth management, and device prioritization
Troubleshooting and optimization of existing Wi-Fi networks
Ongoing support and adjustments as your connected devices grow

networking.name: Networking
networking.description: Complete network design, installation, and management for homes and businesses in South Florida.
networking.fullDescription:
A reliable network is the backbone of modern homes and businesses. At ITfix, we provide comprehensive networking services for clients in Boca Raton, Fort Lauderdale, Deerfield Beach, and throughout South Florida. Whether you need a simple home network, a multi-room smart home infrastructure, or a complete business LAN/WAN setup, our experienced technicians deliver solutions that are fast, secure, and scalable.

Our networking services cover the full spectrum: network design and planning, router and switch configuration, VLAN segmentation, firewall setup, wireless access point deployment, and ongoing maintenance and monitoring. We work with enterprise-grade equipment from leading brands to ensure your network can handle today's demands and grow with your needs tomorrow.

For small businesses, we design networks that support remote work, cloud services, VoIP phone systems, and secure file sharing. For homeowners, we create networks that seamlessly connect smart home devices, streaming equipment, gaming consoles, and work-from-home setups. Every project includes professional cable management and thorough testing.
features: Custom network design and topology planning for homes and businesses
Router, switch, and firewall configuration with enterprise-grade equipment
VLAN segmentation, access control, and advanced security policies
Professional cable management and structured wiring for clean installations
Wireless access point deployment and seamless roaming configuration
Ongoing network monitoring, maintenance, and troubleshooting support

security-cameras.name: Security Cameras
security-cameras.description: Professional CCTV installation with remote monitoring for South Florida homes and businesses.
security-cameras.fullDescription:
Protect your property with a professional security camera system installed by ITfix. We design, install, and configure complete CCTV solutions for homes and businesses in Boca Raton, Fort Lauderdale, and throughout South Florida. From a simple doorbell camera to a multi-camera surveillance system with night vision and motion detection, we tailor every installation to your specific security needs and budget.

Our security camera services include a thorough property assessment to determine optimal camera placement, professional installation of indoor and outdoor cameras, configuration of recording and storage (local NVR or cloud-based), and setup of remote viewing on your smartphone or computer. We work with top brands including Ring, Arlo, Reolink, Hikvision, and Dahua, and we can integrate cameras with existing smart home or security systems.

Whether you want to monitor your front door, keep an eye on your business after hours, or have complete property coverage, ITfix delivers a reliable, easy-to-use security camera system that gives you peace of mind 24/7.
features: Professional property assessment and strategic camera placement planning
Indoor and outdoor camera installation with weatherproof mounting
Remote live viewing and playback on smartphones, tablets, and computers
Recording and storage configuration (local NVR, cloud storage, or hybrid setups)
Motion detection, night vision, and two-way audio setup
Integration with smart home systems and existing security infrastructure

smart-home.name: Smart Home
smart-home.description: Complete smart home setup, automation, and voice control integration in South Florida.
smart-home.fullDescription:
Transform your home into a truly smart, connected space with ITfix's smart home installation and integration services. We help residents in Boca Raton, Fort Lauderdale, and South Florida set up and unify smart devices — lighting, locks, thermostats, speakers, blinds, sensors, and more — into a single, easy-to-manage system controlled by your voice or smartphone.

Our smart home service goes beyond simple device setup. We design automation routines that make your daily life more convenient and energy-efficient: lights that adjust with the sunset, thermostats that learn your schedule, door locks that unlock when you arrive, and security sensors that alert you to unusual activity. We work with all major platforms including Alexa, Google Home, Apple HomeKit, Samsung SmartThings, and Hubitat.

Whether you're starting from scratch or integrating devices you already own, ITfix ensures everything works together seamlessly. We handle the technical complexity so you can enjoy a smarter, more comfortable home without the frustration.
features: Smart device setup and configuration (lighting, locks, thermostats, sensors, cameras)
Custom automation routines and scheduling for convenience and energy savings
Voice control integration with Alexa, Google Home, Apple HomeKit, and more
Multi-brand device compatibility and unified hub configuration
Network optimization for reliable smart device connectivity
Personalized training so you and your family can use your smart home with confidence

ethernet.name: Ethernet
ethernet.description: Professional structured cabling and wired network infrastructure for homes and offices.
ethernet.fullDescription:
For the most reliable, high-speed connections, nothing beats wired Ethernet. ITfix provides professional Ethernet cabling and structured wiring services for homes and businesses in Boca Raton, Fort Lauderdale, and throughout South Florida. We install Cat5e, Cat6, and Cat6a cabling that delivers gigabit-speed performance and forms the solid foundation for any network.

Our Ethernet installation service includes running new cable lines through walls, ceilings, and conduits; installing wall jacks in each room; terminating cables at a central patch panel or network closet; and testing every connection to ensure it meets industry standards. Whether you're building a new home, renovating, or upgrading an existing network, we deliver clean, professional installations that are built to last.

Wired Ethernet connections are essential for gaming PCs, home offices, security camera systems, access points, and any device that demands maximum speed and minimum latency. We also offer fiber optic installations for future-proofing your property's connectivity.
features: Cat5e, Cat6, and Cat6a cable installation for gigabit and multi-gigabit speeds
Wall jack installation and patch panel termination in network closets
Complete structured cabling systems designed for scalability and longevity
Professional cable testing and certification to TIA/EIA industry standards
In-wall, in-ceiling, and conduit routing with clean, professional finishes
Fiber optic installation options for future-proof, ultra-high-speed connectivity

server-setup.name: Server Setup
server-setup.description: NAS, file servers, and automated backup solutions for homes and businesses in South Florida.
server-setup.fullDescription:
Take full control of your data with a professionally configured server or NAS (Network Attached Storage) system. At ITfix, we design and deploy server solutions for homeowners and small businesses in Boca Raton, Fort Lauderdale, and throughout South Florida. Whether you need centralized file storage, automated backups, media streaming, or a complete business server, we'll build and configure a system tailored to your needs.

Our server setup services include hardware selection and assembly, operating system installation (Windows Server, Linux, or NAS OS like Synology DSM or QNAP QTS), RAID configuration for data redundancy, user account and permission management, automated backup scheduling, and secure remote access setup. We also configure file sharing protocols (SMB, NFS, FTP), media servers (Plex, Jellyfin), and email or web servers for businesses.

With a properly configured server, your data is always safe, organized, and accessible from anywhere. ITfix ensures your server is secure, reliable, and easy to manage — and we provide ongoing support to keep it running smoothly.
features: NAS selection, assembly, and configuration (Synology, QNAP, or custom builds)
RAID setup for data redundancy and automatic fault tolerance
File sharing, user management, and granular access permissions
Automated backup scheduling with off-site and cloud backup options
Secure remote access configuration for working from anywhere
Ongoing server maintenance, monitoring, and troubleshooting support

it-consulting.name: IT Consulting
it-consulting.description: Expert IT strategy, technology audits, and infrastructure planning for South Florida businesses.
it-consulting.fullDescription:
Make confident, informed technology decisions with ITfix's professional IT consulting services. We help small and medium-sized businesses in Boca Raton, Fort Lauderdale, and throughout South Florida evaluate their current IT infrastructure, identify vulnerabilities and inefficiencies, and develop a clear, actionable technology roadmap that aligns with their business goals and budget.

Our IT consulting engagements include comprehensive technology audits, security assessments, cloud migration planning, hardware and software procurement guidance, vendor evaluation, and disaster recovery planning. We take the time to understand your business operations, growth plans, and technical challenges — then we deliver practical recommendations you can implement immediately or phase in over time.

Whether you're a startup building your first IT infrastructure, a growing business that needs to scale its technology, or an established company looking to modernize, ITfix provides the expert guidance you need. We speak your language, respect your budget, and focus on solutions that deliver real value.
features: Comprehensive IT infrastructure audit and technology assessment
Custom technology roadmap aligned with your business goals and budget
Security assessment, compliance review, and risk mitigation strategies
Cloud migration planning and hybrid infrastructure design
Vendor evaluation, procurement guidance, and cost optimization analysis
Ongoing advisory support and quarterly technology reviews

ai-agents-setup.name: AI Agents Setup
ai-agents-setup.description: Custom AI agent automation for remote workers and small offices. Automate emails, reports, scheduling, and daily tasks.
ai-agents-setup.fullDescription: We design, deploy, and maintain AI agents tailored to your workflow. Whether you work from home or run a small office, our AI automation solutions handle repetitive tasks so you can focus on what matters. We set up private, secure AI systems that integrate with your existing tools — email, calendar, file management, CRM, and more. No cloud dependency required: we can run everything locally on your hardware for maximum privacy and control. Includes initial setup, training, documentation, and 30 days of post-launch support.
features: Workflow audit and automation planning
Private AI agent deployment (local or cloud)
Integration with email, calendar, files, and CRM
Training and 30-day post-launch support
